---
title: "Guozheng"
listing:
  id: posts
  contents: posts/**/*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, date, title]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
date-format: short
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
toc: true
---

## Recent posts

::: {#posts}
:::

<a href="../posts/index.html"> <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary float-end btn-sm">See all</button></a>
